markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance, publishing strategy, and new AI initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Organic traffic is up 68% YoY** since content publishing began in April, with average search position dropping from 88 to 4.5.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Publishing will slow to \~2–3 articles/day** to avoid alarming search bots; a backlog of \~100 articles is awaiting legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**AI visibility is low (9% vs. CareCredit's 30%)** and will be improved with new "Sunbit vs. Cherry" comparison articles and JSON schema implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**New AEO experiments were approved,** including FAQ pages for LLMs and a test of publishing case studies as blog posts to drive traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Organic Growth:** Since content publishing began in April, the site has seen:](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**68% YoY increase** in organic search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Average search position drop** from 88 to 4.5.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Significant increases** in time on site and page depth.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
      - [**Goal:** Publish \~2–3 articles/day (vs. 10/day) to maintain a natural pace for search bots.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Backlog:** \~100 articles are with the legal team; approval will replenish the "ready to publish" queue.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Content Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
      - [**Pattern:** Articles about Sunbit or finance receive more scrutiny.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX is using a running feedback document to improve future content.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)

### AI Visibility & New Initiatives

  - [**Current AI Visibility (via Scrunch tool):**](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
      - [**Brand Mentions:** Sunbit appears in 9% of AI responses, compared to CareCredit's 30%.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Sentiment:** Generally positive when Sunbit is mentioned.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Strategic Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [**Competitor Focus:** Cherry Technologies is an emerging threat; new "Sunbit vs. Cherry" articles will be created to influence LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [**Technical Improvement:** JSON schema will be added to page headers to improve AI parsing.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [**Approved Experiments:**](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [**LLM-Specific FAQs:** Create dedicated Q\&A pages for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
          - [**Option 1:** Publish as standard pages.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
          - [**Option 2:** Mark as `noindex` and reference only in `LLMS.txt` for exclusive LLM access.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Case Study Test:** Publish case studies as blog posts to test traffic and conversion. If successful, the separate case studies section will be retired.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ehtisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Send the next batch of 25 articles to "ready to review."](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
      - [Continue sending 10 articles/day until the "ready to publish" queue is depleted.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [Research Cherry Technologies differentiators for comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [Flesh out the LLM FAQ page experiment with Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Publish articles at a cadence of \~2–3 per day.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Implement JSON schema on all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [Test publishing case studies as blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/epy1Xm1k_FHD79fNZ5evHfJhvrbKHoQe?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
